Bug List

Global mt_ConfRead
Each line has the following syntax :

Global mt_EvntExec
With the use of the flag EVM_IN_USE, problems may appear if this function is re-entrant (f.e. if one of these find->proc callback function calls EvntExec(). Normally, this doesn't happen.

Global mt_FormThbSet
FIXME - Does not work correctly.

Global mt_FrameCreate
sliders of framed window are not correctly initialized

Global mt_ShelWrite
The ARGV protocol is not handled.

Desktop accessories can not be launched.
